_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: Trinity Hall Irish Pub
venues.note: Mockingbird Station Irish pub; well-known Dallas soccer-watching venue that opens for internationals.

venues.name: The Londoner
venues.note: British pub group with an English-football following; opens early for Premier League and national-team matches.

venues.name: Frankie's Downtown
venues.note: Downtown Dallas sports bar with many screens; default USMNT/tournament spot. UNVERIFIED affiliation — confirm.
